description: Worktree listing should use 'git worktree list' to discover worktrees instead of assuming they live in a .worktrees folder. The code already uses git commands in ListWorktrees(), but verify it doesn't rely on path conventions for discovery
note: Verified that ListWorktrees() uses 'git worktree list --porcelain' without path assumptions. Discovery works regardless of worktree location. All tests pass. The .worktrees convention in createWorktree() is only for creation, not discovery.
acceptance_criteria: Verify ListWorktrees properly uses 'git worktree list --porcelain' without path assumptions
Remove any code that assumes worktrees are in .worktrees/ folder relative to project
Worktrees should be discovered regardless of their location on filesystem
Existing tests in worktree_test.go should continue to pass
